scope: repository-owned docs/** and README* paths; node_modules and .git excluded

classification.rawAssetPolicy: Eight binary assets retained in place; no history, public docs, or asset moved or deleted.

postcondition: Every in-scope path contributes to retained path digests and classification counts; public docs/history/assets remain separate and in place.
limitations: Counts do not prove semantic correctness.
Remaining SPEC/public-maintainer lifecycle reconciliation continues in later HGI-200 slices.
nonClaims: No API, SDK, docs runtime, release, registry, publication, provider, or production behavior is proved.
